meta.source: Swedish Tax Agency (Skatteverket) — illustrative; always verify against official tables
meta.notes: Kommunalskatt Stockholm kommun ~30.24% (kommun 17.74% + landsting 12.50%). Statlig inkomstskatt applies above the 'skiktgräns'. Jobbskatteavdrag and grundavdrag simplify to an effective withholding curve.

grundavdrag.notes: Simplified: grundavdrag reduces taxable income. Actual computation varies by income bracket. Below is a piecewise approximation for illustration.

jobbskatteavdrag.notes: Approximate job tax deduction for earned income (employment/self-employment). Complex formula simplified as a lookup.

effectiveWithholdingTable.notes: Simplified monthly gross → approximate effective tax rate (total withholding including kommunalskatt, statlig skatt minus jobbskatteavdrag & grundavdrag). For projection use only.

benefitWithholdingRate.notes: Parental leave pay / sickness benefit / unemployment benefit: taxed as income but without arbetsgivaravgifter, jobbskatteavdrag is lower. Approximate flat withholding.
